metadata.name: Cross-Industry Negotiation: Retail & Public Sector Collaboration

description: An AI agent must bridge a complex data and policy gap between the Retail and Public Sector sectors.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve and map data from Retail legacy schema to Public Sector standards using the global_mapping_table.json.

expected_outcome.expected: Data is normalized across both domains.

nodes.task_description: Resolve a policy conflict where Retail privacy rules clash with Public Sector disclosure mandates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies a compliant middle-ground or escalates correctly.
